response: Chancellor Otto von Bismarck and the Reichstadt Agreement were also part of the **League of the Three Emperors** (Dreikaiserabkommen), which was an alliance between the German Empire, the Russian Empire, and Austria-Hungary. This alliance was established in 1873 and lasted until 1887. The Reichstadt Agreement was a specific agreement made between Austria-Hungary and Russia in 1876, which was part of this broader alliance.
